questions.prompt: Which method handles a rejected Promise?
questions.explanation: .catch() is shorthand for .then(null, onRejected) and handles rejections.

questions.prompt: Promise.all() rejects as soon as any input promise rejects.
questions.explanation: Promise.all() fails fast — the first rejection causes the entire aggregate to reject.
Unlike Promise.all(), allSettled waits for all promises and never rejects — each result has {status, value/reason}.
options: An array of {status, value/reason} for every promise
Only the first fulfilled promise's value
A single resolved value combining all results
questions.answer: An array of {status, value/reason} for every promise
